# txtcel_program

> Native (non-Anchor) on-chain Solana program for Txtcel: a permanent, public,
> on-chain channel/forum protocol. A thread (channel) owns a doubly-linked list
> of alloc "pages"; each page holds 31 content (message) slots. Fees accrue in
> sharded vault PDAs and are swept to the platform treasury or the thread author.
> The program reads its program_id at runtime (no `declare_id!`), so one binary
> runs on any cluster.

This file is generated for LLM/agent consumption. The code is the source of
truth; this file and the README are kept in sync by hand.

## Repository layout
- src/lib.rs: entrypoint, instruction dispatch, `solana_security_txt`.
- src/instruction.rs: `ProgramInstruction` enum (Borsh) and variant indices.
- src/state.rs: account layouts, discriminator tags, constants, PDA derivation.
- src/error.rs: `ProtocolError` custom error codes.
- src/content/: opaque, type-tagged message body encoding.
- src/processor/: one handler module per instruction (`process_*`).

## Core data model
- ThreadNode: full-address (keypair) account = the channel identity. Not a PDA; its pubkey is the "seed" every child PDA derives from.
- AllocNode: PDA [alloc, thread, alloc_seq]. 31 content slots. Doubly-linked via upper_alloc_seq + next_alloc_seq.
- ContentNode: PDA [content, thread, alloc_seq, slot]. Header + kind:u16 + opaque body (<= MAX_BODY_LEN). New message kinds need no program upgrade.
- ThreadAccess: PDA [access, thread]. Optional gating: enabled, admin, entry_fee, whitelist_count.
- AccessEntry: PDA [acl, thread, wallet]. One per wallet; status allow(0)/deny(1)/fee-exempt(2).
- AllocLikes: PDA [likes, thread, alloc_seq]. One u32 like counter per slot.
- ProgramSettings: PDA [settings]. Global admin, treasury, four fee bps.
- Vault shards: treasury (N_TREASURY_SHARDS=512, global) and author-fee (N_AUTHOR_FEE_SHARDS=4 per thread).

## Key constants (src/state.rs)
- CONTENT_SLOTS=31, EXTEND_THRESHOLD=16, MAX_BODY_LEN=8192, MAX_TITLE_LEN=64.
- N_TREASURY_SHARDS=512, N_AUTHOR_FEE_SHARDS=4.
- MAX_FEE_CUT_BPS=5000 (50% cap on any admin-set platform cut). INDEX_NONE=u32::MAX.
- InitSettings defaults all four fee bps to 1000 (10%).

## Fee model
- Base fee (platform): base_fee_bps of the rent of any newly allocated account; always to a treasury shard.
- Message fee (author): fixed lamports per post (ThreadNode.message_fee), split via author_fee_cut_bps.
- Like fee (author): fixed ThreadNode.like_fee, split via like_cut_bps.
- Entry fee (author): ThreadAccess.entry_fee on RequestAccess, split via entry_cut_bps.
- Cut bps = the platform's share; the remainder goes to the author. Sweeps move shard balances out.

## Instructions (Borsh variant index -> name -> authority)
- 0 CreateRootAlloc -> anyone (becomes thread author)
- 1 FillSlot -> anyone (gated); post a message; optional auto-extend; max_fee slippage cap
- 2 PrepareAlloc -> anyone; pre-create next alloc page
- 3 SweepTreasury -> anyone; funds only to settings.treasury
- 4 SweepAuthorFees -> thread author (must sign)
- 5 CloseAccount -> content author; refunds rent
- 6 InitSettings -> program upgrade authority (once)
- 7 SetTreasury -> admin
- 8 InitThreadAccess -> thread author
- 9 SetThreadAccess -> thread admin
- 10 AddToWhitelist / 11 RemoveFromWhitelist -> thread admin
- 12 SetMessageFee -> thread author
- 13 SetBaseFee / 14 SetAuthorFeeCut / 15 SetEntryCut / 16 SetLikeCut -> admin
- 17 SetLikeFee -> thread author
- 18 SetEntryFee -> thread admin
- 19 RequestAccess -> anyone (pay entry fee to join)
- 20 LikeContent -> anyone; max_fee slippage cap
- 21 AddToBlacklist / 22 RemoveFromBlacklist -> thread admin
- 23 AppendContent -> content author, within a 120s window of created_at
- 24 SetAdmin -> admin
- 25 AddToFeeWhitelist / 26 RemoveFromFeeWhitelist -> thread admin

## PDA seeds (src/state.rs)
- settings: ["settings"]
- alloc: ["alloc", thread, alloc_seq u32 le]
- content: ["content", thread, alloc_seq u32 le, slot u8]
- access: ["access", thread]
- access entry: ["acl", thread, wallet]
- likes: ["likes", thread, alloc_seq u32 le]
- treasury shard: ["treasury_shard", shard u16 le]
- author fee: ["author_fee", thread, shard u8]

## Build, test, deploy
- cargo build-sbf                                   # deployable .so
- cargo build --features no-entrypoint              # host build
- cargo test --features no-entrypoint               # unit tests
- solana program deploy target/deploy/txtcel_program.so

## Conventions for agents
- Code is the source of truth; README.md and llms.txt are generated.
- Account order in each process_* exactly matches the README "Accounts" tables.
- All PDAs are re-derived in-program; never trust a caller-supplied address.
- Gating PDAs (access/entry) sit at fixed positions so checks cannot be skipped.
- Closed accounts are zeroed, shrunk and reassigned to the System Program (no in-tx revival).

## More
- README.md: full instruction-by-instruction reference, PDA table, error codes.
- SECURITY.md: security policy (also embedded in the binary via solana_security_txt).
- @txtcel/protocol: TypeScript SDK mirroring seeds, tags and instruction indices.
